The golden uma yoriki seeks help sharing the joy of horses with a singularly unappreciative audience.
※This quest is available for a limited time only.

The golden uma yoriki seeks help sharing the joy of horses with a singularly unappreciative audience.
※This quest is available for a limited time only.

1:
The golden uma yoriki would like to advertise the beauty of horses. Wear the uma kabuto and seek out his confederate, the golden uma doshin, at Bentbranch Meadows.

※Please note that you will be unable to complete this quest after the seasonal event has ended. For details, please check the Lodestone.
